scripts.test:firestore:rules: npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only firestore "vitest run --config vitest.firestore-rules.config.mts"
scripts.e2e:entry-finance: playwright test --grep "edit entry workflow|pay period and gross pay calculation|unrated entries are counted correctly"
scripts.e2e:org-ruleset: playwright test --grep "ruleset authoring creates an active ruleset|ruleset flow supports create edit and delete|ruleset authoring blocks invalid config|pay summary renders ruleset premium lines|flat-fee critical journey"
scripts.firebase:emulators:start: npx firebase-tools emulators:start --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only auth,firestore,hosting
scripts.firebase:emulators: npx firebase-tools emulators:start --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only auth,firestore,hosting
scripts.firebase:emulators:export: npx firebase-tools emulators:start --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only auth,firestore,hosting --export-on-exit=./store/firebase-emulator-data
scripts.firebase:check:node20: node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (Number.isNaN(major)) { console.error('Unable to parse Node.js version:', process.version); process.exit(1); } if (major < 20) { console.error('Node 20+ is recommended for Firebase CLI parity. Current:', process.version); process.exit(1); } console.log('Node version is compatible for Firebase CLI parity:', process.version);"
scripts.firebase:verify:emulator:smoke: npm run firebase:check:prereqs && npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only auth,firestore "node -e \"console.log('Firebase emulator smoke check passed')\""
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting: npx firebase-tools deploy --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --only hosting --non-interactive
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting:build: npm run build && npm run firebase:deploy:hosting
scripts.firebase:deploy:preview: npx firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy preview --project work-tracker-98f72 --config firebase.json --non-interactive
scripts.f004:hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && chmod +x .githooks/* && echo 'F-004 hooks installed'
scripts.f004:verify: npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit && node scripts/f004-routing/cli.mjs verify
